use_cases: Form submission and action triggers in web applications
Call-to-action buttons for user conversion flows
Interactive controls in dashboards and admin panels
Standardized button styling across a design system
ai_summary: A foundational shadcn/ui Button component with comprehensive variant support including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for variant management, it provides consistent button styling across SaaS and web applications with standard, small, large, and icon size options.
